name: XAUUSD_M5_AsiaLondonRangeBreakout
hypothesis: When XAUUSD builds a compressed Asia-session range (0.5-2.0x ATR) between 00:00-06:00 UTC, the first London-session breakout (07:00-10:00 UTC) with body >=1.0x ATR and close >=0.4x ATR beyond the range boundary produces a directional expansion yielding PF>=2.0 over 200+ trades.

regime_filter.notes: Require non-dead-volatility regime; skip extreme spike bars.

entry_rules.long: After 06:00 UTC, record AsiaHigh/AsiaLow. Between 07:00-10:00 UTC, enter long on first M5 close > AsiaHigh + 0.4*ATR(14) with candle body >= 1.0*ATR(14). Asia range must satisfy 0.5 <= (AsiaHigh-AsiaLow)/ATR(14) <= 2.0.
entry_rules.short: Mirror: first M5 close < AsiaLow - 0.4*ATR(14) with body >= 1.0*ATR(14) under same range-size constraints.

exit_rules.trailing: After +1.0 ATR in favor, move stop to breakeven; trail at 1.5*ATR chandelier

falsifier: If <150 qualifying breakouts over 3yr backtest or PF<1.6 across XAUUSD M5, kill branch.
